turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, I'm calling about Medicaid... no wait, I mean Mediassist TPA. Do you work with them?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, we are listed under Medi Assist's network hospitals. You should be able to avail cashless services here.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: That's a relief. I've been trying to find a network hospital close to Kothrud and you guys came up.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, we're conveniently located. For cashless admission, please ensure Medi Assist has issued a pre-auth approval before or at the time of admission. Our staff will coordinate directly with them.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: What if it's an emergency? Do I still need pre-auth?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: For emergencies, you can be admitted without prior approval, but please ensure someone informs Medi Assist within 24 hours. Our insurance team will assist with that process.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Happy to help! Wishing you good health.
